openQuestions: Q1: Is folding deep-loop-runtime INTO deep-loop-workflows (as system-deep-loop) mechanically safe, and where does each component land?
Q2: How many bidirectional path-couplings exist between the two skills, and what breaks silently if a coupling is not repaired?
Q3: How does the system-spec-kit tooling-borrow (node_modules reach-ins + artifact-root re-export) behave post-merge, and does artifact-root.cjs's own internal path survive the repair table?
Q4: What is the full reference-migration surface across commands/agents/READMEs/advisor-corpus, and what is the risk of incomplete migration?
Q5: Should fallback-router.ts be wired for real GLM-5.2 -> MiMo-v2.5-Pro fallback given it has zero callers today?
resolvedQuestions: Q1: Structural layout is mechanically sound; runtime nests as infrastructure, not a workflow mode; one fresh hub graph-metadata.

Q2: Directional path-repair rules are correct, but Class B inventory is incomplete (omits orchestrate-session.cjs, runtime-capabilities pair, deep-review/reduce-state) and misses an absolute-path form in replay-graph-from-artifacts.cjs.
Q3: Stage-3b package.json/tsconfig repairs are correct; artifact-root.cjs internal path.join + artifact-root.vitest.ts + dependency-seams.vitest.ts are a missed P0 load-bearing seam.

Q4: Migration surface is broad but bounded (33 commands + dual-runtime agents + 4 READMEs); advisor is highest-risk (no runtime registry read; 3 hardcoded constants + divergence-ledger field-vs-prose ratchet).
Q5: Wire fallback (optional/P2); router is reusable as-is; 004 plan needs slug→id adapter + quota/auth failure-class capture; independent of the structural merge.

keyFindings.title: Detached fan-out boundary conflicts with YAML spec.md mutation — guard is one-sided
Class B reverse-coupling inventory incomplete (orchestrate-session.cjs + runtime-capabilities pair + deep-review/reduce-state omitted)
evidence: 11 distinct-file reverse require inventory vs 002 Class B table

keyFindings.title: replay-graph-from-artifacts.cjs absolute-path form invisible to relative-require grep
artifact-root.cjs internal path.join + 2 test companions missed by 002 Stage-3b
Advisor does not read mode-registry.json at runtime — rename needs projection-map regen + 3 hardcoded-constant updates + drift-guard rerun
Divergence ledger mixes identity fields with historical prose — blind replace corrupts reason narratives
Dual-runtime agent mirror (5 opencode + 5 claude) is a sync hazard — agent-mirror sync check is mandatory
004 plan misses slug→registry-id model adapter (fan-out dispatches full provider slug, registry keys on bare id)
retry-exhausted-only fallback call site misses quota/auth failures (classified FATAL/non-retryable at cli-guards.cjs:188-196)

ruledOutDirections: Adding runtime as a mode-registry workflowMode (category error)
